tools.name: add_device
tools.description: Request adding a device to a track by name.

tools.name: add_notes
tools.description: Add MIDI notes to a clip. Each note: {pitch (0-127), start (beats), duration (beats), velocity (0-127)}.

notes.description: List of notes with pitch (0-127), start (beats), duration (beats), velocity (0-127)

tools.name: arm_track
tools.description: Arm or disarm a track for recording.

tools.name: browse_devices
tools.description: List Ableton device categories available in the browser.

tools.name: browse_plugins
tools.description: Get plugin browsing status.

tools.name: capture_midi
tools.description: Capture the last-played MIDI notes into a clip.

tools.name: clear_automation_envelope
tools.description: Clear (delete) the automation envelope for a device parameter in a clip.

tools.name: consolidate_clip
tools.description: Initiate consolidation of arrangement clips in a time range.

tools.name: continue_playing
tools.description: Continue playback from the current position.

tools.name: create_audio_clip_in_lane
tools.description: Create an audio clip inside a take lane. Requires Live 12+.

tools.name: create_audio_track
tools.description: Create a new audio track at the end of the track list.

tools.name: create_automation_envelope
tools.description: Create an automation envelope for a device parameter in a clip.

tools.name: create_group_track
tools.description: Create a new empty group track.

tools.name: create_locator
tools.description: Create a cue point (locator) at a specific time.

tools.name: create_midi_clip
tools.description: Create a new empty MIDI clip in a Session view slot. The slot must be empty.

scene_index.description: 0-based scene (row) index — slot must be empty

tools.name: create_midi_clip_in_lane
tools.description: Create a MIDI clip inside a take lane. Requires Live 12+.

tools.name: create_midi_track
tools.description: Create a new MIDI track at the end of the track list.

tools.name: create_return_track
tools.description: Create a new return track.

tools.name: create_scene
tools.description: Create a new scene at the end of the scene list.

tools.name: create_take_lane
tools.description: Create a new take lane on a track. Requires Live 12+.

tools.name: delete_clip
tools.description: Delete the clip in a session slot.

tools.name: delete_device
tools.description: Delete a device from a track.

tools.name: delete_locator
tools.description: Delete a cue point by index.

tools.name: delete_scene
tools.description: Delete a scene by index.

tools.name: delete_take_lane
tools.description: Delete a take lane. Requires Live 12+.

tools.name: delete_track
tools.description: Delete a track by index.

tools.name: deselect_all_notes
tools.description: Deselect all notes in a MIDI clip.

tools.name: duplicate_clip
tools.description: Duplicate the clip in a slot.

tools.name: duplicate_scene
tools.description: Duplicate a scene; copy inserted immediately after the original.

tools.name: duplicate_to_arrangement
tools.description: Duplicate a session clip to the arrangement view at the current playback position.

tools.name: duplicate_track
tools.description: Duplicate a track; copy inserted immediately after the original.

tools.name: flatten_track
tools.description: Flatten a frozen track to audio. Track must be frozen first.

tools.name: focus_track
tools.description: Select and focus a track in the current view.

tools.name: freeze_track
tools.description: Freeze a track to reduce CPU usage.

tools.name: get_all_param_display_values
tools.description: Get display values for all parameters of a device.

tools.name: get_application_version
tools.description: Get full Ableton Live version information.

tools.name: get_arrangement_clips
tools.description: Get all clips in the arrangement view for a track.

tools.name: get_arrangement_overdub
tools.description: Get the current arrangement overdub state.

tools.name: get_automation_envelope_values
tools.description: Check whether an automation envelope has any breakpoints.

tools.name: get_browser_items
tools.description: Get browser items for a category: devices, plugins, instruments, audio_effects, midi_effects.

tools.name: get_build_id
tools.description: Get the Ableton Live build identifier. Requires Live 12+.

tools.name: get_can_jump_to_next_cue
tools.description: Check whether there is a next cue point to jump to.

tools.name: get_can_jump_to_prev_cue
tools.description: Check whether there is a previous cue point to jump to.

tools.name: get_chain_devices
tools.description: Get all devices within a specific rack chain.

tools.name: get_clip_annotation
tools.description: Get annotation text for a clip.

tools.name: get_clip_automation_envelope
tools.description: Check whether an automation envelope exists for a device parameter in a clip.

tools.name: get_clip_color
tools.description: Get the color of a clip.

tools.name: get_clip_fade_in
tools.description: Get the fade-in time for an audio clip.

tools.name: get_clip_fade_out
tools.description: Get the fade-out time for an audio clip.

tools.name: get_clip_file_path
tools.description: Get the file path of the audio sample for an audio clip.

tools.name: get_clip_follow_action
tools.description: Get the follow action for a clip. Codes: 0=Stop, 1=Play Again, 2=Previous, 3=Next, 4=First, 5=Last, 6=Any, 7=Other, 8=Jump.

tools.name: get_clip_info
tools.description: Get information about a clip (name, length, loop, MIDI/audio type, playing state, color).

tools.name: get_clip_notes
tools.description: Get all MIDI notes from a clip.

tools.name: get_clip_ram_mode
tools.description: Check whether an audio clip is loaded into RAM.

tools.name: get_clip_start_time
tools.description: Get the start time property of a clip in the arrangement.

tools.name: get_clip_warp_mode
tools.description: Get the warp mode for an audio clip. 0=Beats, 1=Tones, 2=Texture, 3=Re-Pitch, 4=Complex, 5=Complex Pro.

tools.name: get_clips_in_take_lane
tools.description: Get all clips inside a take lane. Requires Live 12+.

tools.name: get_crossfader_assignment
tools.description: Get a track's crossfader assignment: 0=None, 1=A, 2=B.

tools.name: get_crossfader_position
tools.description: Get the master crossfader position (-1.0 to 1.0).

tools.name: get_current_time
tools.description: Get the current playback position and playing state.

tools.name: get_cv_tools_devices
tools.description: List all CV Tools devices on a track (filtered by name containing 'CV').

tools.name: get_device_chains
tools.description: Get the chains of an instrument/effect rack device.

tools.name: get_device_class_name
tools.description: Get the internal class name of a device (e.g. 'OriginalSimpler', 'Compressor2').

tools.name: get_device_param_display_value
tools.description: Get a parameter's value as displayed in the Live UI (e.g. '128 Hz'). Falls back to string on older Live.

tools.name: get_device_parameter_by_name
tools.description: Find a device parameter by name.

tools.name: get_device_parameters
tools.description: Get all parameters for a device.

tools.name: get_device_presets
tools.description: Get available presets for a device.

tools.name: get_device_type
tools.description: Get the device type: 0=audio_effect, 1=instrument, 2=midi_effect.

tools.name: get_groove_amount
tools.description: Get the global song groove amount.

tools.name: get_groove_pool_grooves
tools.description: List all grooves in the groove pool.

tools.name: get_locators
tools.description: Get all cue points.

tools.name: get_loop_enabled
tools.description: Get the current arrangement loop state and bounds.

tools.name: get_m4l_devices
tools.description: List all Max for Live devices on a track.

tools.name: get_m4l_param_by_name
tools.description: Get a device parameter value by name.

tools.name: get_master_chain_summary
tools.description: Get all devices on the master track with full enriched parameter lists in a single call — avoids multiple round-trips for mastering work.

tools.name: get_master_device_param_info
tools.description: Get enriched info for a single master track device parameter by name. Faster than get_master_device_params when you only need one parameter.

tools.name: get_master_device_params
tools.description: Get all enriched parameter info for a device on the master track (name, raw_value, display_value, min, max, is_quantized, value_items).

tools.name: get_master_devices
tools.description: Get all devices on the master track.

tools.name: get_master_track_info
tools.description: Get master track information (name, volume, pan, devices).

tools.name: get_metronome_volume
tools.description: Get the metronome volume.

tools.name: get_notes_extended
tools.description: Get MIDI notes filtered by time and pitch range.

time_span.description: Duration of filter window in beats

tools.name: get_project_root_folder
tools.description: Get the project root folder path.

tools.name: get_rack_contents
tools.description: Get full rack interior: all chains, chain devices, and enriched device parameters in one call.

tools.name: get_return_track_count
tools.description: Get the number of return tracks.

tools.name: get_return_track_info
tools.description: Get information about a return track.

tools.name: get_sample_length
tools.description: Get the raw sample length of an audio clip.

tools.name: get_sample_playback_mode
tools.description: Get the playback mode of a Simpler or Sampler device.

tools.name: get_scene_color
tools.description: Get a scene's color index.

tools.name: get_scene_info
tools.description: Get information about a scene (name, color, tempo, time signature).

tools.name: get_scene_is_empty
tools.description: Check whether a scene has no clips across all tracks.

tools.name: get_scene_tempo
tools.description: Get the tempo override set on a scene, if any.

tools.name: get_session_automation_record
tools.description: Get whether session automation recording is enabled.

tools.name: get_session_info
tools.description: Get a full snapshot of the session state (tempo, tracks, scenes, playback status).

tools.name: get_session_record
tools.description: Get the session record state.

tools.name: get_signature_denominator
tools.description: Get the global time signature denominator.

tools.name: get_signature_numerator
tools.description: Get the global time signature numerator.

tools.name: get_take_lane_name
tools.description: Get the name of a specific take lane. Requires Live 12+.

tools.name: get_take_lanes
tools.description: Get all take lanes on a track. Requires Live 12+.

tools.name: get_track_annotation
tools.description: Get the annotation text for a track.

tools.name: get_track_available_input_routing_types
tools.description: List available input routing type names for a track.

tools.name: get_track_available_output_routing_types
tools.description: List available output routing type names for a track.

tools.name: get_track_chain_summary
tools.description: Get all devices on any track with full enriched parameter lists in a single call — lets the AI read the entire device chain in one round trip.

tools.name: get_track_color
tools.description: Get the color of a track.

tools.name: get_track_delay
tools.description: Get a track's delay compensation value in samples.

tools.name: get_track_device_params
tools.description: Get all enriched parameter info for a device on any track (name, raw_value, display_value, min, max, is_quantized, value_items).

tools.name: get_track_devices
tools.description: Get all devices on a track.

tools.name: get_track_index_by_name
tools.description: Find a track's index by name. Case-insensitive, partial match, returns first result.

name.description: Track name or partial name to search for

tools.name: get_track_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a track (name, volume, pan, devices, clips, etc.).

tools.name: get_track_input_routing_type
tools.description: Get the current input routing type for a track.

tools.name: get_track_is_foldable
tools.description: Check whether a track is foldable (i.e. is a group track).

tools.name: get_track_is_frozen
tools.description: Check whether a track is currently frozen.

tools.name: get_track_is_grouped
tools.description: Check whether a track is a member of a group.

tools.name: get_track_output_routing
tools.description: Get the current output routing configuration for a track.

tools.name: get_track_sends
tools.description: Get all send levels for a track.

tools.name: get_variant
tools.description: Get the Ableton Live edition (e.g. 'Suite', 'Standard', 'Intro'). Requires Live 12+.

tools.name: get_warp_markers
tools.description: Get all warp markers from an audio clip.

tools.name: group_tracks
tools.description: Group a range of tracks together.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Get health status: Ableton version, queue depth, tool count.

tools.name: hide_plugin_window
tools.description: Hide the editor window for a device/plugin.

tools.name: insert_automation_step
tools.description: Insert an automation breakpoint at a specific time and value.

tools.name: is_max_device
tools.description: Check whether a device is a Max for Live device.

tools.name: jump_by_amount
tools.description: Move the playback position by a relative offset in beats (negative to go backward).

tools.name: jump_to_next_cue
tools.description: Jump playback to the next cue point.

tools.name: jump_to_prev_cue
tools.description: Jump playback to the previous cue point.

tools.name: jump_to_time
tools.description: Move the playback position to a specific beat.

tools.name: launch_clip
tools.description: Launch (fire) a clip.

tools.name: launch_scene
tools.description: Launch (fire) all clips in a scene.

tools.name: load_device_from_browser
tools.description: Load a device from the browser onto a track by name.

tools.name: mute_track
tools.description: Mute or unmute a track.

tools.name: nudge_down
tools.description: Nudge the playback position down.

tools.name: nudge_up
tools.description: Nudge the playback position up.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Check that the ALiveMCP Remote Script is running in Ableton.

tools.name: quantize_clip
tools.description: Quantize a MIDI clip to a grid value (e.g. 0.25 for 16th notes).

quantize_to.description: Grid size in beats (e.g. 0.25 for 16th notes)

tools.name: quantize_clip_pitch
tools.description: Quantize MIDI clip pitch to a target pitch.

tools.name: randomize_device
tools.description: Randomize all enabled, non-quantized parameters of a device (richer response).

tools.name: randomize_device_parameters
tools.description: Randomize all non-quantized parameters of a device.

tools.name: re_enable_automation
tools.description: Re-enable all overridden automation.

tools.name: redo
tools.description: Redo the last undone action in Ableton.

tools.name: remove_automation_step
tools.description: Remove an automation breakpoint at a specific time.

time.description: Time in beats of breakpoint to remove

tools.name: remove_notes
tools.description: Remove MIDI notes from a clip within a pitch and time range.

tools.name: rename_scene
tools.description: Rename a scene.

tools.name: rename_track
tools.description: Rename a track.

tools.name: replace_selected_notes
tools.description: Replace the currently selected notes with new notes.

notes.description: Replacement notes with pitch, start, duration, velocity, optional muted

tools.name: scroll_view_to_time
tools.description: Request the arrangement view to scroll to a specific time.

tools.name: select_all_notes
tools.description: Select all notes in a MIDI clip.

tools.name: send_midi_cc
tools.description: Send a MIDI Control Change message.

track_index.description: Track index (required but unused for routing)

tools.name: send_program_change
tools.description: Send a MIDI Program Change message.

track_index.description: Track index (required but unused for routing)

tools.name: set_arrangement_overdub
tools.description: Enable or disable arrangement overdub.

tools.name: set_back_to_arranger
tools.description: Enable or disable Back to Arrangement mode.

tools.name: set_chain_mute
tools.description: Mute or unmute a rack chain.

tools.name: set_chain_solo
tools.description: Solo or unsolo a rack chain.

tools.name: set_clip_annotation
tools.description: Set annotation text for a clip.

tools.name: set_clip_color
tools.description: Set a clip's color using an Ableton color index.

tools.name: set_clip_end_marker
tools.description: Set the end marker (playback end point) of a clip in beats.

tools.name: set_clip_fade_in
tools.description: Set the fade-in time for an audio clip.

tools.name: set_clip_fade_out
tools.description: Set the fade-out time for an audio clip.

tools.name: set_clip_follow_action
tools.description: Set follow actions for a clip. Codes: 0=Stop, 1=Play Again, 2=Previous, 3=Next, 4=First, 5=Last, 6=Any, 7=Other, 8=Jump.

tools.name: set_clip_gain
tools.description: Set clip gain (audio clips only).

tools.name: set_clip_groove
tools.description: Assign a groove pool groove to a clip.

tools.name: set_clip_groove_amount
tools.description: Set groove amount for a clip (0.0 to 1.0).

tools.name: set_clip_loop_end
tools.description: Set the loop end position within a clip in beats.

tools.name: set_clip_loop_start
tools.description: Set the loop start position within a clip in beats.

tools.name: set_clip_looping
tools.description: Enable or disable looping for a clip.

tools.name: set_clip_muted
tools.description: Mute or unmute a clip.

tools.name: set_clip_name
tools.description: Rename a clip.

tools.name: set_clip_pitch_coarse
tools.description: Transpose a clip by semitones.

tools.name: set_clip_pitch_fine
tools.description: Fine-tune a clip's pitch in cents.

tools.name: set_clip_ram_mode
tools.description: Control whether an audio clip streams from disk or loads into RAM.

tools.name: set_clip_signature_numerator
tools.description: Set a clip's local time signature numerator.

tools.name: set_clip_start_marker
tools.description: Set the start marker (playback start point) of a clip in beats.

tools.name: set_clip_start_time
tools.description: Set the start time of a clip.

tools.name: set_clip_warp_mode
tools.description: Set the warp mode for an audio clip. 0=Beats, 1=Tones, 2=Texture, 3=Re-Pitch, 4=Complex, 5=Complex Pro.

tools.name: set_clip_warping
tools.description: Enable or disable warping for an audio clip.

tools.name: set_crossfader_assignment
tools.description: Set a track's crossfader assignment: 0=None, 1=A, 2=B.

tools.name: set_device_on_off
tools.description: Enable or disable a device.

tools.name: set_device_param
tools.description: Set a device parameter by index.

tools.name: set_device_parameter_by_name
tools.description: Set a device parameter by name.

tools.name: set_device_preset
tools.description: Load a preset for a device by index.

tools.name: set_follow_action_time
tools.description: Set the time before the follow action triggers, in bars.

tools.name: set_groove_amount
tools.description: Set the global song groove amount (0.0 to 1.0).

tools.name: set_loop_enabled
tools.description: Enable or disable the arrangement loop.

tools.name: set_loop_length
tools.description: Set arrangement loop length in beats.

tools.name: set_loop_start
tools.description: Set arrangement loop start position in beats.

tools.name: set_master_device_param
tools.description: Set a master track device parameter by index. Value is clamped to the parameter's min/max.

tools.name: set_master_device_param_by_name
tools.description: Set a master track device parameter by name. For quantized params pass a string from value_items (e.g. '4:1'). For continuous params pass a number (clamped to min/max). Matches first parameter with that name.

value.description: Display string for quantized params, or numeric string for continuous

tools.name: set_master_pan
tools.description: Set master track pan (-1.0 to 1.0).

tools.name: set_master_volume
tools.description: Set master track volume (0.0 to 1.0).

tools.name: set_metronome
tools.description: Enable or disable the metronome.

tools.name: set_metronome_volume
tools.description: Set the metronome volume (0.0 to 1.0).

tools.name: set_punch_in
tools.description: Enable or disable punch-in recording.

tools.name: set_punch_out
tools.description: Enable or disable punch-out recording.

tools.name: set_record_mode
tools.description: Set session or arrangement record mode: 0=session, 1=arrangement.

tools.name: set_return_track_volume
tools.description: Set a return track's volume (0.0 to 1.0).

tools.name: set_sample_playback_mode
tools.description: Set the playback mode of a Simpler or Sampler device.

tools.name: set_scene_color
tools.description: Set a scene's color.

tools.name: set_session_automation_record
tools.description: Enable or disable session automation recording.

tools.name: set_session_record
tools.description: Enable or disable session recording.

tools.name: set_take_lane_name
tools.description: Set the name of a take lane. Requires Live 12+.

tools.name: set_tempo
tools.description: Set the session tempo. Valid range: 20–999 BPM.

tools.name: set_time_signature
tools.description: Set the session time signature.

tools.name: set_track_annotation
tools.description: Set the annotation text for a track.

tools.name: set_track_color
tools.description: Set a track's color using an Ableton color index.

tools.name: set_track_current_monitoring_state
tools.description: Set track monitoring state: 0=In, 1=Auto, 2=Off.

tools.name: set_track_delay
tools.description: Set a track's delay compensation in samples.

tools.name: set_track_device_param
tools.description: Set a track device parameter by index. Value is clamped to the parameter's min/max.

tools.name: set_track_device_param_by_name
tools.description: Set a track device parameter by name. For quantized params pass a string from value_items (e.g. '4:1'). For continuous params pass a number (clamped to min/max). Matches first parameter with that name.

value.description: Display string for quantized params, or numeric string for continuous

tools.name: set_track_fold_state
tools.description: Fold or unfold a group track.

tools.name: set_track_input_routing
tools.description: Set a track's input routing type.

tools.name: set_track_input_sub_routing
tools.description: Set a track's input sub-routing channel.

tools.name: set_track_output_routing
tools.description: Set a track's output routing type.

tools.name: set_track_output_sub_routing
tools.description: Set a track's output sub-routing channel.

tools.name: set_track_pan
tools.description: Set a track's panning (-1.0 full left to 1.0 full right).

tools.name: set_track_send
tools.description: Set a send level for a track (0.0 to 1.0).

tools.name: set_track_volume
tools.description: Set a track's volume (0.0 to 1.0).

tools.name: show_arrangement_view
tools.description: Switch to the Arrangement view.

tools.name: show_clip_view
tools.description: Switch to the Session view.

tools.name: show_message_box
tools.description: Show a message dialog box to the user in Ableton. Requires Live 12+.

tools.name: show_plugin_window
tools.description: Show the editor window for a device/plugin.

tools.name: solo_track
tools.description: Solo or unsolo a track.

tools.name: start_playback
tools.description: Start Ableton playback (no-op if already playing).

tools.name: start_recording
tools.description: Enable record mode and start playback.

tools.name: stop_all_clips
tools.description: Stop all playing clips across all tracks.

tools.name: stop_clip
tools.description: Stop clips on a track (all clips on the track are stopped).

tools.name: stop_playback
tools.description: Stop Ableton playback (no-op if not playing).

tools.name: stop_recording
tools.description: Disable record mode (does not stop playback).

tools.name: tap_tempo
tools.description: Send a tap-tempo pulse.

tools.name: trigger_session_record
tools.description: Trigger session recording with an optional fixed length in beats.

length.description: Recording length in beats; omit for open-ended

tools.name: undo
tools.description: Undo the last action in Ableton.

tools.name: unfreeze_track
tools.description: Unfreeze a frozen track.

tools.name: ungroup_track
tools.description: Ungroup a group track.
